title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description: Configure GitHub Actions to automate build, test and deployment workflows.

title: Redesign landing page
description: Update the public landing page with new branding, copy and responsive layout.

title: Migrate database to MongoDB Atlas
description: Move the existing local MongoDB instance to a managed Atlas cluster with proper indexing.

title: Write unit tests for auth module
description: Achieve at least 80% test coverage on the authentication service and middleware.

title: Conduct Q1 performance review
description: Evaluate team KPIs for Q1 and prepare individual feedback reports.

title: Implement role-based access control
description: Add admin/user role guards to all API endpoints and update middleware accordingly.

title: Build reporting dashboard
description: Create an analytics dashboard showing task completion rates and team activity.

title: Integrate Stripe payment gateway
description: Add subscription billing using Stripe Checkout and webhook handling for payment events.

title: Set up Sentry error monitoring
description: Integrate Sentry in both the backend and mobile app for real-time error tracking.

title: Document REST API with Swagger
description: Add JSDoc Swagger annotations to all routes and publish the OpenAPI spec.

title: Conduct user acceptance testing
description: Run UAT sessions with 10 external users and collect structured feedback on core flows.

title: Audit existing codebase
description: Review all modules for dead code, security issues and outdated dependencies.

title: Migrate to TypeScript
description: Convert the existing JavaScript backend to TypeScript with strict mode enabled.

title: Set up Docker environment
description: Containerize the app and database with Docker Compose for consistent local development.

title: Write onboarding documentation
description: Create a developer onboarding guide covering setup, conventions and deployment steps.

title: Design system architecture
description: Define microservices boundaries, data flow and infrastructure for the new platform.

title: Implement push notifications
description: Integrate Firebase Cloud Messaging for task assignment and deadline reminder notifications.

title: Set up Redis caching layer
description: Cache frequent DB queries using Redis to reduce latency on organization and task endpoints.

title: Localize app to Spanish and French
description: Add i18n support and translate all UI strings to Spanish (es) and French (fr).

title: Penetration testing
description: Engage an external security firm to perform a full penetration test on the API and mobile app.

title: Optimize mobile app startup time
description: Profile and reduce cold start time on Flutter app to under 2 seconds on mid-range devices.

title: Plan Q2 product roadmap
description: Define Q2 milestones, prioritize backlog items and align with stakeholders.

title: Build arc reactor simulation module
description: Develop the core physics simulation engine for arc reactor energy output modelling.

title: Upgrade JARVIS NLP model
description: Fine-tune the language model powering JARVIS on domain-specific engineering datasets.

title: Procurement report for Q1
description: Compile and submit the Q1 procurement and vendor spending report to the board.

title: Iron Man suit telemetry API
description: Expose real-time suit diagnostics over a secure WebSocket API with sub-100ms latency.

title: Legal compliance review
description: Review all contracts and IP agreements with external partners for Q2 compliance.

title: Onboard new engineering interns
description: Prepare workstations, access credentials and a week-long onboarding plan for 3 new interns.

title: Deploy staging environment
description: Provision a staging server mirroring production for pre-release QA testing.
